content.body:
When scope is user or org, leo init now automatically initializes
.leo/ in child directories:
- Org folders (containing repos) get scope: org
- Repos (.git/ present) get scope: repo
- Already-initialized dirs are skipped
- Recurses: user → org folders → repos

Replaces the passive "Note: these repos don't have .leo/" message
with actual propagation.
content.subject: feat(init): propagate init to child org folders and repos
content.summary:
